news.t: Will an All-Weather Asset Plan Keep You Safe?
Is the Ultimate Buffett Stock a Value Opportunity?
GuruFocus Announces Launch of Guru Favorite Stocks ETF

holdings.infoBox: GFGF is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 7.76%, Alphabet at 5.80%, MSCI Inc. at 5.18%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.09%, and ASML Holding at 5.04%.

overview.description: The Guru Favorite Stocks ETF (GFGF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects US-listed companies that are favored by prominent long-term investors. GFGF was launched on Dec 16, 2021 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

data.title: Will an All-Weather Asset Plan Keep You Safe?
data.text: With a volatile market, inflation and more than a little anxiety over the possibility of recession, interest in the All-Weather Portfolio originated by Ray Dalio (Trades, Portfolio) is up.
